item.name: Yok Huy Stonecutter
item.description:
This flatfish calls the still pool of the Sunken Stars its home.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: This bladelike fish is said to resemble the implements used by Yok Huy quarry workers. Individuals with ragged fins are sarcastically likened to old tools sorely in need of a good honing.
